calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Dec-10-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Theresa Nagle for Scott Hodges (Petitioner).

Ms. Nagle explained the extent of services provided to support the request for extraordinary fees. The Court granted the petition, (signing the order for the same in open court).

Judge: Raymond J. Arata. Reporter: Leticia Perez, CSR#7782. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy J. Guitron.
